title: upsert_space_member does not bump state_seq causing JMAP clients to miss USER_JOINED
description: store.rs upsert_space_member() (called by the USER_JOINED handler in relay.rs) does not call bump_state_seq('SpaceMember'). The sibling function upsert_space_member_with_role() does bump the seq. As a result, JMAP clients polling SpaceMember/changes will never see state changes from peer joins routed through the relay connector. The membership table is updated in SQLite but the JMAP state counter is not advanced. Fix: add bump_state_seq('SpaceMember') inside the upsert_space_member transaction, mirroring upsert_space_member_with_role.
